caption:
My couch looked OLD. I fixed it for under $80. No new couch needed.

Here's exactly what I used:
1. Mamma Mia Sofa Cover — $39 (universal fit, 30+ colors)
2. Mamma Mia Cushion Covers (set of 4) — $28

I was sleeping wrong for 30 years. This pillow changed everything.

Eli & Elm Side Sleeper Pillow — $99 (was $150). Adjustable fill, cooling cover, proper neck alignment for side sleepers. 4.8 stars f
